title: 2021-2026 Toyota Sienna Front Door Check Strap Limiter Removal And Installation Instructions
description: Master Technician Viktor G shows the DIY how-to replacement procedure of the front door limiter checks strap. This is the part that needs to be replaced if your door is making a clicking or popping noise when opening or closing. Please help support my channel by making any purchase using the following affiliate links for which I may receive a small commission, or use the Super Thanks button to donate to the channel directly.

items.name: Automotive trim and clip removal kit
